prompt: Low-angle shot on the concrete steps of a brutalist modern art museum or architectural landmark. An East Asian male professional in his early 50s, projecting sophisticated authority, sits casually on the steps. He is reviewing a large, unfolded physical 'visual standard' blueprint document—not a screen. He wears a structured indigo blue blazer (#2563eb) and dark trousers. Beside him rests a vibrant emerald green (#1e40af) tote bag and a bright blue (#3b82f6) notebook. The background features strong geometric concrete lines and glass, symbolizing structure and consistency. The lighting is late afternoon golden hour, casting long dramatic shadows. A moment of strategic planning outside the office walls. Fujifilm Pro 400H film aesthetic with lifted shadows and creamy highlights, shot on Leica M11, 35mm lens, f/4, documentary authenticity, soft natural window light, photojournalism for Fast Company
